title: Passkeys (the Future)
drDigitalIntro: Passkeys are the next generation of password security — they replace passwords entirely. Instead of typing a password, you verify with your face (Face ID) or fingerprint. Passkeys are cryptographically secure and phishing-proof. Apple is rolling out passkeys for iCloud, banking, and shopping websites. You don't need to remember anything — your Mac or iPhone handles it. Passkeys are coming to everything, and they're much safer than passwords.
drDigitalSuccess: You understand the future of passwords!
drDigitalHint: Passkeys use biometric verification — your face or fingerprint.
